scripts.typecheck:backend: npm --workspace backend/ai run typecheck && npm --workspace backend/functions run typecheck
scripts.test:backend: npm --workspace backend/ai test && npm --workspace backend/functions test
scripts.test:rules:emulators: JAVA_HOME=${JAVA_HOME:-/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21} PATH="${JAVA_HOME:-/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21}/bin:$PATH" firebase emulators:exec --project openlarp-rules-test --only firestore,storage "npm run test:rules"
